content:
Hey @everyone! I just had an idea on how to potentially make things easier in the coordination department.
How do y'all feel about just uploading files directly through Discord to a dedicated channel (like #uploads)? That way coordination would actually be a lot easier, and there would be a LOT less steps involved for volunteers, as the only interfacing with GitHub that would be needed is to sign the Ledgers.

I think it would be a lot easier also if all the files stayed as .xlsx as well, because I'm realizing .csv just doesn't work for my purposes as well. And no one would have to rename any of the files either!
<@88644018673582080> you're still working on Miryam's story right? I just realized I never put you on the header for Desecrate in my repo. Should I?
whoops sorry, just realized I never updated on discord...no need to add me since I haven't been able to work on it for a while

you may want to update the file though since I did finish all of the flavor text/stage titles/details and like 1.5 stages or so of the actual story which is currently live in-game: https://github.com/BIAVGit/Morimens-Localizations/pull/20/commits/385833f4633faf1e64512f48de6b3835ce16595f

I thought I implemented everything that went through BIAVGit but I guess not <:aurita_dizzy:1408324284702654556> I just compiled that into my file, and WOW is your translation WAY better lol. I really hope you have more time to work on it sometime soon! Gonna continue to wait to play the story until I can get the rich experience <:casiah_wink2:1333982149107253338>
